definitions.available: Mapillary camera metadata is within 110 m and approximately faces the building
definitions.downloaded: at least one candidate frame exists in the local image cache
definitions.analyzed: the deterministic facade matcher has processed the local frame
definitions.enhanced: a reviewed Mapillary-backed descriptor is active in building-details.json
definitions.needsConfirmation: visual review found useful evidence but could not safely confirm the footprint/facade identity
definitions.rejected: visual review found that the evidence should not be attached to this footprint

reviewDecision.reason: The urgent-care image includes neighboring storefronts and the parcel contains four buildings; facade-edge identity needs confirmation.
The assigned region contains a residential-looking manufactured building and carport with no religious or civic identity; parcel use alone is insufficient.
Several nearly identical manufactured homes share the parcel and tree cover prevents a confirming oblique view.
Only one useful daylight view exists and neighboring manufactured homes are tightly spaced.
A plausible church appears at the far left of the image, but the assigned edge-4 region falls over lawn and street; the visible tower and wall cannot be safely attached to that edge.
The predicted regions contain several closely spaced manufactured or display homes and never isolate one complete facade; the apparent units also conflict with the parcel context.
Three views show a vacant paved slab, fencing, or neighboring structures rather than a building at the mapped footprint, indicating that it is absent or demolished.
The assigned regions are obscured by a vehicle or show the adjacent real-estate storefront; no Masonic Lodge facade or signage is defensibly visible.
The assigned regions contain fence, trees, and lawn; a gray building appears outside the indicated region and no readable church signage is visible.
The useful target region overlaps two manufactured-home display units only about seven meters apart; alternate frames provide no confirmation.
